description: Manage Zencoder/Zenflow projects, tasks, plans, workflows, and automations. Delegate complex coding problems to Zenflow's AI agents and track their progress.

auth.token_hint: JWT access token (three base64url segments separated by dots)
auth.instructions:
Zencoder uses an OAuth2 client_credentials exchange that IronClaw cannot perform itself. Obtain a JWT access token first, then paste it here.

1. Generate a personal access token at https://auth.zencoder.ai (Administration > Settings > Personal Tokens). Copy the Client ID and Client Secret immediately — the secret is only shown once.

2. Exchange the credentials for an access token (run in bash/zsh):

   curl -s -X POST https://fe.zencoder.ai/oauth/token \
     -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
     -d '{"client_id":"<CLIENT_ID>","client_secret":"<CLIENT_SECRET>","grant_type":"client_credentials"}'

3. Copy the access_token value from the JSON response and paste it at the prompt below.

Tip: pipe the response through jq -r .access_token to avoid copying by hand. Single quotes around the JSON body avoid shell smart-quote issues.
